title: RFP Commercial Credit Origination, Assessment & Workflow Platform
description: Request for Proposal for a Commercial Credit Origination, Assessment & Workflow Platform. NBC seeks proposals from qualified vendors to provide a comprehensive commercial credit platform. The successful bidder should demonstrate experience in banking software, credit origination systems, and workflow automation.

contact.name: Procurement Department
contact.address: National Bank of Commerce Limited, Tanzania

eligibility: Open to all registered suppliers. Must demonstrate experience in banking software and credit origination systems.
submission_requirements: One original hard copy and one additional filled copy, both enclosed in sealed envelopes. Must be submitted no later than Friday, 13th March 2026 at 1600 hrs.
mandatory_requirements: Evidence of at least 5 successfully completed similar projects
Annual returns submitted to relevant regulatory body
